title: Omnibus Health and Human Services supplemental appropriations

actions.description: Senate file first reading, referred for comparison HF4466
Bills not identical, SF substituted on General Register
House rule 1.21, placed on Calendar for the Day Thursday, May 7, 2026
Point of order raised, ruled well taken multiple points of order
Senate refuses to concur, conference committee of 4 requested
Senate conferees Wiklund, Mann, Boldon, and Utke
House accedes, conference committee of 4 to be appointed
House conferees Bierman, Reyer, Backer, and Nadeau
Senate adopted conference committee report, bill repassed
Third reading as amended by Conference
Bill was repassed as amended by Conference
Referred to Health and Human Services
Comm report: To pass as amended and re-refer to Finance
Comm report: To pass as amended
Senate not concur, conference committee requested
Senate conferees Wiklund; Mann; Boldon; Utke
House conferees Bierman; Reyer; Backer; Nadeau
Senate adopted CC report and repassed bill
